arts.ttl: Erling Haaland's contract length is "absurd" - but Man City news is "special" amid Real Madrid, Barcelona links
arts.sum: The length of Erling Haaland's new Man City contract is "absurd", but his long-term commitment to the club is "special news", Citizen expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Benfica boss tells Barca to expect an ‘interesting challenge’
arts.sum: Barcelona are in Portugal on Tuesday night for a game against Benfica and will be hoping for the win that secures a place in the next round. Benfica boss Bruno Lage says Barcelona will find his team an “interesting challenge” as the two sides prepare to meet in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: West Ham launch €67m bid for Barcelona forward target
arts.sum: Barcelona have been scouring European football for their next answer at the number nine position, in acknowledgement that Robert Lewandowski will be 37 next August, even if his contract is set to continue for next season. One of the names they have identified as a potential successor is subject of a major transfer bid in […] The post West Ham launch €67m bid for Barcelona forward target appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s draw with Getafe followed by death threats
arts.sum: Online trolls target Getafe coach Bordalás after Barça game Barcelona’s draw against Getafe on Saturday generated a huge number of talking points, with Barça president Joan Laporta labelling the performance of the match officials a “disgrace” and a “scandal,” while coach Hansi Flick claimed he had “never experienced anything like” the “emotion in the stadium, in all the actions, in the contacts”.
